commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8aabc3d04e257e537c5344d46e2c79d8d103a702)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Slack-only image annotation helpers and injects a timestamp/position metadata line into Slack supplemental thread history text before the Slack message id line.

PR surface: Source +120, Tests +138. Total +258 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level gap: current main can attach recent history images and still labels them without sent time or bounded-history position. I did not run a live Slack workspace reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer review should decide whether to redirect this branch to the shared recent-history image path or accept it as a Slack-only partial improvement with the linked issue left open.

target.title: feat(slack): inject image annotation in thread history for temporal context (fixes #48321)
target.author: liuhao1024
